task_text: Re-issue the Hermes Commerce Agent PRD as extends-Hermes: four shared primitives (commerce_catalog, commerce_cart, commerce_order_state, commerce_payment_link) callable by existing portfolio agents; binding money-moving invariants; full compliance matrix; deterministic/LLM boundary; deterministic state machine; LogEntry variant enumeration; dispatcher posture; handoff workflow; test plan. Slice 1 ships library-only with placeholder payment-link.
